description: Dux-Soup is a LinkedIn automation tool that handles connection requests, profile visits, and messaging on autopilot, with CRM integrations for lead management.
overview: Dux-Soup automates LinkedIn connection requests, profile visits, and messaging with human-like pacing, integrating with CRMs so teams can scale outreach safely.
what_is: Dux-Soup is a LinkedIn automation tool for salespeople, agencies, and business owners. It automates connection requests, profile visits, and messaging with personalized delays designed to keep activity safe, which lets users run consistent outreach without manual legwork.

It is strongest for scaling LinkedIn campaigns, whether for a single rep or a team, making lead generation repeatable. Users typically build a steady flow of new prospects over the first weeks and spend far less time on manual outreach.

Dux-Soup fits the go-to-market stack by integrating with CRMs and supporting multichannel workflows for centralized lead management. It is focused on LinkedIn-based outreach rather than other channels or non-automated prospecting.
